ddt:Target.Name: PSCU_CMF1_V1.0
ddt:Target.Description:
** 30/07/2012 Initialisation de la base DDT de la fonction SIEGE_FrontSeat 15-40 Pilote : Assystem (G.OBADIA) Sce : 65620
**19/07/2013 Mise à jour de la base DDT
**20/07/2013 Correction format sur - B_Pillar - Slider length - Massage range
17/01/2014 Ajout des écrans pour les routines d'apprentissage
30/01/2014 Correction DTC inscrit en FirstDTC Ajout des écrans pour le pilotage du siège par I/O control
17/03/14 Correction réponses aux requêtes d'I/O control Correction réponses aux requêtes de reoutine Ajout écran d'identification (VIN, ref part, ref sw, ref hw, version sw)
09/04/14 Modification des positions offset de DataRead pour LED1Heating,LED2Heating,LED1Fan, LED2FAN, HeatingMap, Fan Ajout de la requête OutputControl Ajout des données IOCTL DataIdentifier, PositiveReposnce, StatusRecordParameter, StatusRecordParameterCS1 Ajout des IOCTL précèdents dans l'onglet receive de chaque IO Contol
28/05/14 Corrections sur l'adresse du paramètre EasyAccessPassager Supression de l'étiquette EasyAccessPassager dans l'écran de configuration Modification du codage du bouton SeatWorld
04/06/2014 Correction sur la trame de réponse EasyAccessPassenger
05/11/2014 Application de la base aux véhicule XZG, XZH, XZI, XZJ, XFG, HBA, HJA
20/04/2014 Désaplication de HJA, HBA Création des requêtes pour lecture/écriture des compteurs pour le µC de gestion des moteurs de lombaires, moteur de ventilation, nappe chauffante.
22/05/14 Correction des écrans pour la gestion des compteurs des CC moteurs lombaires, moteurs ventilation, nappe chauffante. Correction des écrans sur les identifications calculateur. Ajout des datas, requêtes et écran de configuration pour les paramètres : HeatingCurrentRaiseUpPhase, TemperatureTargetTMax, HeatingCurrentStabilisedTMax, TemperatureTargetTMin, HeatingCurrentStabilizedTMin.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Pilote : Assystem (MA.COMTE) Sce : DEA-SMB1
10/11/15 PSCU_CMF1_SW7.6 Requêtes : Réécriture des IO Control utilisés dans l'écran "IO Control" Organe : Suppression DTC A963 (Heating Switch) Modification du libellé du DTC A960 "Fan Switch" --> "Fan/Heating Switch" Modification DTC A927 Ajout DTCs A928, A954, A955, A956, A957, A976, A977, A978, A979, A980 Ecrans : Configuration : Suppression du paramètre EA Driver et ajout du paramètre EA Passenger + Correction en écriture des 5 Heating paramètres qui ne fonctionnaient pas dans la version N-1 IO Control : Utilisation des nouveaux IO Control réecrits
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Pilote : Assystem (A.CROITORU) Sce : DEA-SMB1 09/01/2017 PSCU_CMF1 Auto-identification: Add the SW versions + Logiciel Change the size of Logiciel at 11 at the size of Version at 5.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Pilote : Assystem (A.CROITORU) Sce : DEA-SMB1 17/03/2017 PSCU_CMF1 Auto-identification: Logiciel modified
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Pilote : Assystem (A.CROITORU) Sce : DEA-SMB1 01/09/2017 PSCU_CMF1_V1.0 Auto-identification: Add the supplier name Bitron S.p.A. instead of 174 Change the lenght of Suppplier identification at 13.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked
Paramètre de connexion du moteur 1 de lombaire Sens 1
Paramètre de connexion du moteur 2 de lombaire Sens 1

Data.Name: STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH BACKWARD BACKREST
STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH FORWAD BACKREST
STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH BACKWARD TOP BACKREST
STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH FORWAD TOP BACKREST
STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH BACKWARD LUMBAR
STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH FORWAD LUMBAR
STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH DOWN RAISE
STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH UP RAISE
STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH BACKWARD CUSHION
STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH FORWAD CUSHION
STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH DOWN FRONT CUSHION
STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH UP FRONT CUSHION
STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH DOWN LUMBAR
STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH UP LUMBAR
SENSOR HEATING NTC
Data.Comment: Pour relire la température du capteur nappe chauffante

Data.Name: Enregistrement de la lecture de la voie Conducteur/Passager

Item.Text: Flag doesn't reached a modulo 200 value
No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: DataRead.Enregistrement de la lecture de la voie Conducteur/Passager

DataItem.Name: Enregistrement de la lecture de la voie Conducteur/Passager

Request.Name: DataWrite.Enregistrement de la lecture de la voie Conducteur/Passager

DataItem.Name: Enregistrement de la lecture de la voie Conducteur/Passager

STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH DOWN FRONT CUSHION

STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH UP LUMBAR
STATE SWITCH KEYBOARD.STATE SWITCH DOWN LUMBAR

Test.Description: No hall pulses in each of the two movements.
No hall pulses in each of the two movements.
No hall pulses in each of the two movements.
No hall pulses in each of the two movements.
No hall pulses in each of the two movements.
No hall pulses in each of the two movements.
No hall pulses in each of the two movements.
No hall pulses in each of the two movements.
Number of false starts out of range
Number of false starts out of range
Number of false starts out of range
Number of false starts out of range
Number of false starts out of range
Number of false starts out of range
Number of false starts out of range
Number of false starts out of range
